# Implement Substrate Size Mechanical CI Guard

### Context
As defined in Epic #11411, the Antigravity harness enforces a strict limit on injected memory files. After further introspection, the swarm confirmed that the limit is a **per-file cap** of 24,000 bytes, rather than a combined sum.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [x] Create `ai/scripts/check-substrate-size.mjs`.
- [x] Mechanically check the bytes of the target files (`AGENTS.md`, `.agents/ANTIGRAVITY_RULES.md`) independently.
- [x] Fail if **any single file** exceeds 24,000 bytes.
- [x] Provide a console output showing the size of each file and whether it passes or fails.
- [x] Add `ai:check-substrate-size` script to `package.json`.
- [x] Ensure it runs automatically on GitHub Actions CI (`.github/workflows/substrate-size-guard.yml`).
